## Type of Change
<!-- Please delete options that are not relevant. -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code updates that do not change functionality)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update

## Developer Checklist
- [ ] **Branch Safety**: I have verified that I am NOT committing to `main` or `master` directly.
- [ ] **Complexity**: My code respects the Complexity Ceiling Rule (keeps files smaller, prefers simple solutions).
- [ ] **Commits**: My commit messages follow the required format (e.g., `type: short description`).
- [ ] **Self-Review**: I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] **Testing**: I have tested these changes locally and verified they fix the issue or add the feature.
